data.title: Kirkland's rebrands under new ownership at Beyond
data.description: The rebrand to The Brand House Collective will be put to a vote by Kirkland's shareholders in July.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why Amazon Prime Day will test consumers in 2025
data.description: Multiple surveys show tariffs will be on consumers minds when Amazon's Prime Day event arrives in July, but the results could be mixed.

data.title: AppDirect acquires DNE Resources to expand in Canada
data.description: The acquisition follows AppDirect’s purchase of BOX, a retail energy network, and is aimed at strengthening its presence in the energy market across Canada and the U.S.

data.title: QXO makes a $5 billion bid for GMS to expand its digital building products ambitions
data.description: GMS confirmed receipt of the proposal and said its board, with guidance from Jefferies and Alston & Bird, will evaluate the bid.

data.title: Algolia releases an AI tool to give agents secure data access
data.description: The product is designed to connect large language models (LLMs) and AI agents to Algolia’s search and analytics systems.
